title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Unisys India Holdings Services - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Unisys India Holdings Services - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Unisys India Holdings Services, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Backend Developer for our Kolkata operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Unisys India Holdings Services:
Unisys India Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in TensorFlow

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Company-sponsored certifications
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Unisys India Holdings Services!
